en: The Language of Finance The language I'm speaking right now
is on its way to becoming the world's universal language,
for better or for worse. Let's face it, it's the language of the internet.
It's the language of finance. It's the language of air traffic control,
English is everywhere. Now, Mandarin Chinese is spoken by more people,
but more Chinese people are learning English than English speakers are learning Chinese.
ko: 더 많은 중국인이 영어를 배우고 있다.

en: there are two dozen universities in China right now teaching all in English.
English is taking over. And in addition to that, it's been predicted that at the end of the century,
almost all of the languages that exist now, there are about 6,000, will no longer be spoken.
ko: 현재 존재하는 약 6,000개의 언어 중 거의 모든 언어가 사라질 것이라고 예측되고 있다.

en: There will only be some hundreds left.
